title: Ukraine: Civilian detention and enforced disappearances in occupied territories
summary: Amnesty International documented systematic detention and enforced disappearances of civilians in Russian-occupied territories. Detainees held in unofficial facilities, denied access to lawyers and families.

title: Syria: Attacks on healthcare facilities constitute war crimes
summary: Investigation revealed systematic targeting of hospitals and medical facilities in northwest Syria. At least 18 attacks documented between 2022-2023.

title: Myanmar: Military's campaign of atrocities in Sagaing constitutes crimes against humanity
summary: Documented systematic attacks on civilian population by Myanmar military including mass killings, burning of villages, and use of torture. Campaign constitutes crimes against humanity.

title: Ukraine: 'He's Not Coming Back' — War Crimes in Northwest Areas of Kyiv Oblast
summary: Documented extrajudicial executions, unlawful killings, and enforced disappearances in areas previously occupied by Russian forces around Kyiv. Evidence of systematic and widespread violations.

title: Ukraine: Russian Forces' Use of Banned Cluster Munitions
summary: Human Rights Watch documented extensive use of cluster munitions by Russian forces against civilian areas. Multiple strikes on residential neighborhoods, markets, and schools.

title: Sudan: Ethnic Targeting in Darfur by Rapid Support Forces
summary: Documented ethnically targeted violence by RSF and allied Arab militias against Masalit and other non-Arab communities in Darfur. Mass killings, sexual violence, and systematic looting.

title: Gaza: Unlawful Israeli Attacks on Civilian Infrastructure
summary: Documented series of Israeli military strikes on residential buildings, hospitals, and refugee camps in Gaza that violated laws of war. Evidence of disproportionate attacks.

title: Ukraine: Devastating missile strikes on Kharkiv show callous disregard for civilian life
summary: Amnesty International investigation into January 2024 missile strikes on Kharkiv concluded that attacks constituted deliberate targeting of civilians. Pattern of strikes on residential areas during peak activity hours.

title: Ethiopia: Atrocities Continue in Amhara Amid Escalating Conflict
summary: Documented ongoing atrocities in Amhara region during military operations. Extrajudicial killings, mass detention, and destruction of civilian property by Ethiopian Defense Forces.

title: DR Congo: M23 Rebels Commit Mass Killings in North Kivu
summary: Documented mass killings by M23 rebel forces in North Kivu. Attack on displaced persons camp resulted in over 170 civilian deaths. Evidence of systematic targeting.
